ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill (e.g., Python, R, SQL) */,
  "skill_type" TEXT /* Type of the skill (e.g., programming language, data processing framework) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_boards" (
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job board */,
  "job_board_name" TEXT /* Name of the job board (e.g., LinkedIn, Indeed, SimplyHired, Monster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job board where the job posting was found */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job posting */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job posting */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job posting */,
  "desired_skills" TEXT /* Desired skills for the job posting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job posting */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_board_id") REFERENCES job_boards ("job_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_percentages" (
  "skill_percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill percentage entry */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job board */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of job postings requiring the skill */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_percentages_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_percentages_job_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_board_id") REFERENCES job_boards ("job_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glassdoor_percentages" (
  "glassdoor_percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Glassdoor percentage entry */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Self-reported percentage from Glassdoor in 2017 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("glassdoor_percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glassdoor_percentages_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_percentages" (
  "average_percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average percentage entry */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "average_percentage" REAL /* Average percentage of job postings requiring the skill */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_percentages_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difference_percentages" (
  "difference_percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difference percentage entry */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between the average percentage and the Glassdoor percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difference_percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_difference_percentages_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recruiter, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_correlations" (
  "skill_correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill correlation entry */,
  "skill_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first skill */,
  "skill_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second skill */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation between the two skills */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_correlations_skill_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id2") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_correlations_skill_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id1") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_title_correlations" (
  "job_title_correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title correlation entry */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation between the job title and the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_title_correlations_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_title_correlations_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title (e.g., Data Scientist, Data Analyst) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the job title (e.g., data science, data engineering) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the job title (e.g., data scientist - machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_job_title" (
  "skill_job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill-job title relationship */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_job_title_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_job_title_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_categories" (
  "skill_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill category */,
  "skill_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill category (e.g., programming languages, data processing frameworks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_category_skill" (
  "skill_category_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill category-skill relationship */,
  "skill_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill category */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_category_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_category_skill_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_category_skill_skill_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_category_id") REFERENCES skill_categories ("skill_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_title_categories" (
  "job_title_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title category */,
  "job_title_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title category (e.g., data science, data engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_title_category_job_title" (
  "job_title_category_job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title category-job title relationship */,
  "job_title_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title category */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_category_job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_title_category_job_title_job_title_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_category_id") REFERENCES job_title_categories ("job_title_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_title_category_job_title_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission for the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_job_postings" (
  "company_job_posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-job posting relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "job_posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_job_posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_job_postings_job_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
